LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF CALIFORNIA SERVICE BUREAU, INC.'S HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION, DEFENDANT'S CLAIM OF EXEMPTION FROM WAGE GARNISHMENT IS GRANTED. DEFENDANT'S FINANCIAL STATEMENT DEMONSTRATES HER EXPENSES EXCEED HER EARNINGS AND THEREFORE HER WAGES ARE EXEMPT. ORDER SIGNED, FILED, AND MAILED TO PARTIES AND SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY SHERIFF'S OFFICE. JUDGE: ERNEST H. GOLDSMITH; CLERK: SEAN KANE; REPORTER: MELANIE GHENO, CSR #7489 (302/EHG)

calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing On Claim Of Exemption
Off Calendar May-19-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES: Defendant/Judgment Debtor RICA SHAUNTHELE MACDULA, Tel No. (415) 815-7460 appearing in pro per;
No other appearances made in this matter.

RULING - The Court adopted its tentative ruling. As to PLAINTIFF CALIFORNIA SERVICE BUREAU, INC.'S Hearing On Claim Of Exemption, Defendant's claim of exemption from wage garnishment is granted. Defendant's financial statement demonstrates her expenses exceed her earnings and therefore her wages are exempt. ORDER SIGNED, FILED, AND MAILED TO PARTIES AND SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY SHERIFF'S OFFICE. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Sean Kane; Reporter: Melanie Gheno, CSR #7489 (302/EHG)
